title: > Instructions:
content:
> Instructions:
> * Start with the original text.
> * Integrate the strongest insights from the Critique, Logic, Logos, Pathos, and Ethos reviews (assume the goal is a balance of all).
> * Fix the "Blind Spots" and reinforce the "Shatter Points" identified previously.
> * The final output must be cohesive, persuasive, and error-free.
> * At the end, provide a brief "Change Log" explaining the 3 biggest improvements you made.
> Original Content:
> [INSERT ORIGINAL CONTENT HERE]
> (Optional) Notes from previous steps to include:
> [INSERT KEY FEEDBACK SUMMARY HERE]
>
context: From document: Here is a complete prompt chain designed for high-performance Large… — chunk 7 (chunk 7/7)
